notes: Converted from the old chapter extraction schema.
Hidden facts, motives, and faction pressures require living-world re-extraction.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

The seed package describes an ongoing battle scene (巨阳仙尊 and 星宿仙尊 vs 方源, with 乐土/沈伤 allies). All events are publicly observable combat actions (attacks, defenses, formations). No private knowledge, secret plans, future-known information, or knowledge gaps are directly supported by the source text. The relations (e.g., 气绝魔仙 already secretly allied with 方源) are marked ambiguous and not directly quoted from the chapter text. No hidden/player-visibility fact can be extracted from this battle scene without speculation.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

The seed package primarily describes combat actions (方源 being attacked by 巨阳仙尊 and 星宿仙尊, using defensive and offensive moves, healing himself) and 乐土 trying to dismantle the formation. These are all tactical combat behaviors during an ongoing battle. No clear observed motive beyond 'survive the battle' or 'escape pressure' can be confidently inferred from the seed facts alone. Any inferred motive would be a psychological leap beyond what the seed directly supports.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

insufficient source-backed seed: The seed package focuses on individual combatants (方源, 巨阳仙尊, 星宿仙尊, 乐土, 元莲意志, etc.) in a high-level battle. No collective faction/group/clan/family is named as having a concrete stake. '天庭蛊仙' appears in one relation but is not elaborated with any stake or pressure in the seed facts. All actors are individuals (尊者们, 亚仙尊们, 方源 and his clones). No named collective actor with a concrete stake in the seed facts can be identified.
IF export filter quarantined 9 legacy old-schema branches.
